subcodes.title: Words to Julia Grundy spoken around Jan. 1905
subcodes.first_line: True Religion has nothing to do with human imagination. God's Will is independent of human opinion. Personal ideas and mere human prejudice are the great obstacles to spiritual growth.
subcodes.subjects: @role of the Covenant in preserving unity, @unity in diversity, @servitude; submission to God; repentance, @Word of God is its own standard, @religion as reality; definitions of religion
